sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55314" key="katastrhnia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταστρηνιάω</orth>, <sense id="n55314.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">behave wantonly towards</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ Χριστοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:5:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
